meaning: 撒马尔罕[苏联乌兹别克东部城市]
examples: In Samarkand, Mr Bissell admires the architectural wonders, while on his way to Bukhara he gets a taste of police methods when suspected of drug dealing.
He tried again to take Samarkand, and was again beaten back.
For lust of what should not be known we take the Golden Road to Samarkand.
Others, like a gnarled spice seller in Samarkand's bustling bazaar shrug it all off.
By contrast, the splendid cities of Samarkand, Bukhara and Khiva are monuments to the Uzbeks' Islamic civilisation.
